title: Improved Automatic Link Set-up (ALIS-2)
short description: ALIS-2, also known as RS-ARQ, RS ARQ 240, and MERLIN, is an improvement of the original ALIS system. ALIS-2 is used in the Rohde & Schwarz MERLIN modem.
description:
**ALIS-2**, also known as RS-ARQ, RS ARQ 240, and MERLIN, is an improvement of the original [ALIS](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Automatic Link Set-up (ALIS)) system. ALIS-2 is used in the Rohde & Schwarz MERLIN modem. This mode has been used most frequently by Turkish, German and Italian diplomatic stations. The Italian diplomatic stations seem to favor the 5 bit (ITA2) mode. Turkish diplomatic stations have been found using the 8 bit mode for all traffic.

ALIS-2 is described in the "*Report of the CCIR 1990, Fixed Service at Frequencies below about 30 MHz*" of the ITU.
